## Summary

What changed?

## Why

What problem does this solve?

## Testing

- [ ] Ran the game or affected scene
- [ ] Ran relevant headless validation
- [ ] Added screenshots or video for visual changes

## Visuals

Before/after screenshots, clips, or a short note if not needed.

## Scope Check

- [ ] This PR stays focused
- [ ] This PR does not dump unrelated prompt docs or planning text
- [ ] This PR fits the game’s current direction
